calendar.matters:
DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Off Calendar

Joinder To Co-Deft American Honda Motor Co'S Mo To Transfer Venue And Stay Proceedings Pending Transfer Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure § 397(C)
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Matthew A. Hickey, Esq. of WILSON ELSER (415-433-0990), appearing for defendant / moving party American Honda Motor Company
Oren Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party James Glaze
Wykeisha Orr, Esq. of BURNHAM BROWN (510-835-6714), appearing for defendant / joinder Borg-Warner Corporation
Shelley K. Tinkoff, Esq. of BRYDON HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendants / Joinders Pneumo Abex LLC and Toyota Motor Sales, USA, Inc.

RULING:
DEFENDANT PNEUMO ABEX LLC, Joinder To co-defendant American Honda Motor Company's motion to transfer Venue And Stay Proceedings Pending Transfer Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 397(C) is granted. Refer to the underlying motion for details. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077

Joinder In Notice Of Motion To Transfer Venue And Stay Proceedings Pending Transfer
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.'s Joinder In Motion To Transfer Venue And Stay Proceedings Pending Transfer is granted. Refer to the underlying motion for details. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077
